question: Validate the active ZAR-only first-release assumption against all three owned accounts.
context: Pre-implementation gate. Evidence required: representative statement/export currency fields and values from all three owned accounts across both banks. This blocks implementation of Money, account currency, transaction recording, and actuals totals. Planning must create and complete a validation task first; no implementation task in those slices may start while this question is open. If any initial account is non-ZAR, update A1, the PRD, DD-LEDGER-FINANCIAL-REPRESENTATION, affected data models and operation contracts, and tests before implementation.
